0.body: Your comment has been added to the conversation thread.
0.title: Expert Comment Added

databaseQueries.query: SELECT `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` WHERE `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (3) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'

SELECT `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` FROM `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` WHERE `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (3) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
SELECT * FROM `agricultural_professionals` WHERE `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` = 3 and `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` IS not NULL LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO `pest_disease_expert_comments` (`pest_and_disease_id`, `user_id`, `message`, `updated_at`, `created_at`) VALUES (1, 3, 'my new comments ahhaha', '2026-03-16 16:11:30', '2026-03-16 16:11:30')
SELECT * FROM `pest_and_disease` ORDER BY `date_detected` DESC LIMIT 10 offset 0
SELECT * FROM `agricultural_professionals` WHERE `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` = 4 and `agricultural_professionals`.`user_id` IS not NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM `pest_disease_expert_comments` WHERE `pest_disease_expert_comments`.`pest_and_disease_id` = 1 and `pest_disease_expert_comments`.`pest_and_disease_id` IS not NULL ORDER BY `created_at` ASC
